Catalog/Infection Prevention/Baktio Pink Hand Rub
Infection PreventionREF: BAKP-HR

Baktio Pink Hand Rub

· Hand Hygiene

Baktio Pink Hand Rub is a premium alcohol-based hand sanitizer containing 70% alcohol content for effective antimicrobial action against healthcare-associated infections. This infection prevention solution features integrated moisturizers to prevent skin dryness during frequent use, making it ideal for healthcare professionals and hospital environments. The distinctive pink formulation ensures easy identification and compliance monitoring in clinical settings while maintaining superior disinfection efficacy required for medical facilities.

MaterialAlcohol-based solution with moisturizers
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Baktio Pink Hand Rub is a premium alcohol-based hand sanitizer containing 70% alcohol content for effective antimicrobial action against healthcare-associated infections. This infection prevention solution features integrated moisturizers to prevent skin dryness during frequent use, making it ideal for healthcare professionals and hospital environments. The distinctive pink formulation ensures easy identification and compliance monitoring in clinical settings while maintaining superior disinfection efficacy required for medical facilities.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Baktio Pink Hand Rub, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Baktio Pink Hand Rub is constructed using Alcohol-based solution with moisturizers, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
